microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive $14M+ impact across enterprise accounts including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining REST API-driven requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil by 30% and enabled scalable, repeatable execution across complex configurations.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a reusable playbook adopted across engineering orgs.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as **bridge lead** for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract with strict SLA and compliance requirements.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning and restructured end-to-end workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and expanding drill capacity by 21% — directly increasing time-to-value for enterprise customers at scale.

Acted as Voice of the Customer across 4 enterprise integrations, channeling technical escalations and configuration feedback to Product and Engineering to close platform gaps and influence roadmap priorities for billing and compliance-adjacent workflows.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code generation workflows, running live technical demos and training sessions that embedded the tool across 14 key teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly through automated documentation.

Influenced the **product roadmap** toward intent-based YAML generation by facilitating 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating customer objectives into actionable engineering requirements.

Accelerated technical discovery by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling faster self-service resolution across internal teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams with competing expansion roadmaps.

Conducted technical discovery with 20+ service teams to map **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a phased roadmap to automate critical paths and reduce implementation burden across parallel workstreams.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps, prioritize high-impact support, and make data-driven expansion decisions at scale.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** across a 2,000+ unit pilot by owning the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and creating parallel workstreams to accelerate time-to-value for the fleet transition.

Managed the technical escalation queue during migration, triaging and resolving **40+ high-priority tickets**, maintaining SLA compliance, and documenting issues with full context before escalating complex configurations to Engineering.

Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and building a reusable rollout framework for future fleet expansions.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end proposal lifecycle — implementing a CRM-based process to manage 200+ monthly scoping and invoicing workflows and reduce time-to-close on expansion opportunities.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy with optimized web presence, targeting new geographic expansion in under-served service areas.

Strengthened leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering a structured framework that informed future account strategy and resource allocation.
